pizzas.name: Cheese
pizzas.ingredients: Pizza sauce and mozzarella cheese.
pizzas.prompt: Photorealistic menu photograph for Litzas Pizza in Utah. One whole medium-thick crust pizza in a metal pan on a warm, worn wood table. 3/4 overhead angle, warm dark restaurant lighting, classic neighborhood pizzeria feel. Visible browned mozzarella, medium crust, generous but believable toppings. No hands, no plates, no text, no logos, no labels, no impossible slices. Pizza: Cheese. Toppings must match: Pizza sauce and mozzarella cheese.
pizzas.source: provisional style reference; generate final with scripts/generate-menu-photos.mjs
pizzas.usage: Website menu card and SpotOn menu photo export
pizzas.alt: Cheese pizza with pizza sauce and mozzarella cheese on a warm wood table.
pizzas.notes: Queued for GPT Image generation in the Litzas overhead wood-table style.
